label: 1547 CE
era_summary: Year 1547 (MDXLVII) was a common year starting on Saturday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1547: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1547: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Spain-Chile, 1540-61; Turkey-Portugal (Aden), 1547. Maddison records GDP/capita 1623 (ESP, 1547) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
